summary: Regression testing of Sentinel Pulse after major refactoring (monolithic 2308-line server.py split into 12+ modules). All 17 backend API tests pass. All 6 frontend tabs accessible. All required UI elements (PAPER badge, mode indicator, settings toggle) verified working.

issues: WebSocket reconnection attempts visible in console when navigating between tabs - not a bug, expected behavior when WebSocket connection resets during navigation

critical_code_review_comments: REFACTORING SUCCESSFUL: The 2308-line monolithic server.py has been cleanly split into 12+ focused modules
API contracts preserved - all endpoints return identical response structures after refactoring
deps.py shared state pattern working correctly - singletons properly initialized at startup
WebSocket INITIAL_STATE message includes all required fields including simulate_24_7

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all tabs accessible, all UI elements present)

seed_data_creation: Created test ticker TESTGOOG during CRUD test, cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major refactoring regression testing complete. Key modules: server.py (slim orchestrator), deps.py (shared state), schemas.py (Pydantic models), routes/ (health.py, brokers.py, tickers.py, trades.py, bot.py, ws.py). All API endpoints tested: /api/health, /api/settings (GET/POST), /api/tickers (CRUD), /api/brokers (list/status/reconnect/single), /api/trades, /api/portfolio, /api/positions, /api/strategies, /api/metrics, /api/traces, /api/bot/start, /api/bot/stop. WebSocket INITIAL_STATE verified with simulate_24_7 field. Frontend verified: PAPER badge in header, Paper Trading indicator in Watchlist, Trading Mode section with toggle in Settings.

verified_endpoints.GET /api/settings: WORKING - returns simulate_24_7, trading_mode, telegram, account_balance
verified_endpoints.POST /api/settings: WORKING - toggles simulate_24_7, persists to MongoDB
verified_endpoints.GET /api/trades?limit=5: WORKING - returns trades with trading_mode field
verified_endpoints.WebSocket /api/ws: WORKING - sends INITIAL_STATE with simulate_24_7 field

verified_frontend.All 6 tabs accessible: WORKING - Watchlist, Positions, History, Logs, Brokers, Traces, Settings
